title: MapLock - Anti Map Duplication
description: This plugin will protect maps that owners set to be uncopiable
body:
** Plugin that no one asked but i made anyways**

This plugin will protect maps that owners set to be uncopiable, giving an error when you try to place it inside a cartography or crafting table.
The map creator can lock and only the map creator can unlock it again, its uuid bonded.

Commands:

- /maplock - will lock and unlock the map

Any bugs please let me know. Plugin was tested on latest paper server for minecraft 1.21.8​
